org.docgene.help.locale

Class Localization

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.help.locale.Localization
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Locales, LocalizationKeys

    public class Localization
extends java.lang.Object
implements Locales, LocalizationKeys
    Hold the localization for the help.
    Since:
    1.6.5.7

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.help.locale.Locales

        ENGLISH, FRENCH, GERMAN, ITALIAN, RUSSIAN, SPANISH

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.help.locale.LocalizationKeys

        ANCHORS, ARTICLES, FULLTEXTSEARCH_TEXT, HINT_TEXT, TITLES

      Return the Locale language.

      Return the locale.

      Return the name for a key.

      Return true if a key is supported.
      boolean isDefaultLocale()
      Return true if the locale is the default locale.

      Set the Locale to use for the GUI.

      Set the Locale to use for the GUI.

    • Method Detail

      • setLocale

        public void setLocale(java.util.Locale locale)
        Set the Locale to use for the GUI.
        Parameters:
        locale - the Locale

      • setLocale

        public void setLocale(java.lang.String lang)
        Set the Locale to use for the GUI.
        Parameters:
        lang - the Locale language

      • isDefaultLocale

        public boolean isDefaultLocale()
        Return true if the locale is the default locale.
        Returns:
        true if the locale is the default locale

      • getLocale

        public java.util.Locale getLocale()
        Return the locale.
        Returns:
        the Locale

      • getLanguage

        public java.lang.String getLanguage()
        Return the Locale language.
        Returns:
        the Locale language

      • hasKey

        public boolean hasKey(java.lang.String key)
        Return true if a key is supported.
        Parameters:
        key - the key
        Returns:
        true if the key is supported

      • getName

        public java.lang.String getName(java.lang.String key)
        Return the name for a key. It will for example return "Titles" for the LocalizationKeys.TITLES key in "en-us", or "Titres" in "fr".
        Parameters:
        key - the key
        Returns:
        the name
